ticketBody:
## Context
/health returns a bare ok. Report uptime + version.

## Plan
Use the respond helper (#1) in route('/health').

### Acceptance Criteria
- GET /health -> {status:'ok', uptimeSeconds:number, version:string}.
- uptimeSeconds grows across calls.

## Tests + evals
test/routes.test.ts health cases.

## Docs pages touched
docs/user-guide/index.md.

## Out of scope
Auth.

Depends on: #1
acceptanceCriteria:
